clusters.justification: This domain encompasses the broad generation, experience, and regulation of subjective mood and emotional states typically subserved by cortico-subcortical limbic and salience loops.
This domain captures the neuroeconomic and motivational processes of computing the subjective worth of stimuli to drive goal-directed choice and decision-making within dopaminergic reward circuitry.

This overarching domain encapsulates the internally-directed perspective shifts required to construct complex representations of the self, personal narrative time, and the minds of others, canonically mapping onto the default mode network.
